name: Downtown Hargrove
label: Downtown
description: Central business district. City hall, banks, law offices, the Daily Register building.

name: North Hargrove
label: Northside
description: Upper-middle-class residential. Tree-lined streets, larger lots, established families.

name: East Hargrove
label: Eastside
description: Middle-class residential and small commercial. Strip malls, family restaurants, auto shops.

name: West Hargrove
label: Westside
description: Mixed residential and light commercial. Older housing stock, corner stores, community feel.

name: South Hargrove
label: Southside
description: Industrial zone. Warehouses, distribution centers, manufacturing plants, freight yards.

name: University District
label: University Dist.
description: Hargrove State University campus and surrounding area. Rentals, cafes, bookstores, tech startups.

name: Innovation Corridor
label: Tech Corridor
description: Office parks and tech companies. Dot-com era startups, server farms, ISP offices.

name: Old Town
label: Old Town
description: Historic district. Preserved storefronts, antiques, local restaurants, city museum.

name: Valley Heights
label: Valley Heights
description: Affluent residential. New developments, gated communities, large properties.

name: Harbor District
label: Harbor
description: Port and logistics area. Rail yard, trucking companies, cold storage facilities.

name: Midtown Hargrove
label: Midtown
description: Dense mixed-use. Offices, retail, apartments above shops. The working city.

name: Riverside
label: Riverside
description: Working-class residential near the river. Smaller homes, community parks, local businesses.
